rules.rule: A solution must include at minimum: an API project, a Build infrastructure project, a Provision infrastructure project, a Build test project, and an Acceptance test project.
Project names must follow the pattern {Product}.{Layer}.
The API project must organise code into: Brokers/, Models/, Services/, Controllers/, and Migrations/ (when EF Core is used).
Models/ must be sub-organised by service layer. Each entity folder must contain an Exceptions/ subfolder.
Services/ must be sub-organised by service layer: Foundations/, Processings/, Orchestrations/, etc.
Test project folder structure must mirror the API project structure, grouping tests by Services/[Service Type]/[ServiceName].
Projects must not use a flat folder structure — all code must be organised into the defined hierarchy.
Entity model folders must not omit the Exceptions/ subfolder.
